base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of level_3_manji_first_quest — a tile (level_layout) from 1986 legend of zelda. Level 3 'Manji' (swastika-like religious symbol, removed in some localizations) — Manhandla boss, Raft-item. Infamous for religious-symbol censorship in NA release. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Level 3 'Manji' (swastika-like religious symbol, removed in some localizations) — Manhandla boss, Raft-item. Infamous for religious-symbol censorship in NA release
